name: ricdom
description: JSON-based real-time control DOM library for Electron/browser
author: miyoshi-tec

scripts.build: node scripts/gen_version.js && npm run build:core && npm run build:ui && node scripts/build_icons.js && node scripts/update_sizes.js
scripts.build:core: npx esbuild src/ricdom_globals.js   --bundle --minify --outfile=RicDOM.min.js   --platform=browser && node scripts/build_lz_bundle.js RicDOM.min.js RicDOM.lz.min.js
scripts.build:ui: npx esbuild src/ricui_globals.js    --bundle --minify --outfile=RicUI.min.js    --platform=browser && node scripts/shorten_css_classes.js RicUI.min.js && node scripts/compress_css_in_js.js RicUI.min.js && node scripts/build_lz_bundle.js RicUI.min.js RicUI.lz.min.js
